Geometry provenance: single-point evaluation on the user-supplied Cartesian coordinates in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz – no re-optimization.
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit or explicit solvation model).
Charge & multiplicity: charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet).  N ± 1 states automatically treated as doublets (cation and anion each multiplicity 2).
Convergence & warnings: SCF cycles for the N, N+1, and N–1 states all converged; integrity status "ok", trustworthy = true.  The engine issued three warnings reproduced verbatim below.
